issues_addressed.1: last_reported freshness handling, 1800-second default and clearer first-run documentation
issues_addressed.2: writer bookkeeping after successful write, mapped entities and reduced redundant Master-OFF writes
issues_addressed.3: clear mapping documentation and zero-watt-safe fallback resolvers

privacy_note: Instance-specific entity states, timestamps, energy values and local audit reports are intentionally not included in the public release.
